About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Data Today's data shows two dominant performers at the top of the momentum rankings. LBRT leads decisively with a composite score of 96.8 (rank 1), driven by exceptional long-term returns of 175.63% over one year and 100.36% over six months, while maintaining strong consistency across all timeframes with 4 out of 5 ratio passes and excellent performance on down SPY days (99.7 score). TXN follows as the second-ranked momentum play with a 65.74% one-year return and particularly strong intermediate momentum—its one-month return of 44.42% significantly outpaces SPY by 31.82 percentage points—though it shows a weaker ratio consistency score (0.55 on the 3m/1m ratio indicates some deceleration). Both securities trade above all major moving averages (30/50/100/200 day), signaling healthy technical positioning, but LBRT's superior ratio consistency and resilience metrics suggest more sustainable momentum versus TXN's more volatile acceleration pattern.
